title: CompletedTask
description: Output of an L4 execution agent, input to the L5 Evaluation Layer. Describes what was changed and exposes the artefacts evaluators need.

result.description: succeeded = ready for evaluators. failed = agent could not produce a usable artefact. needs_replan = agent thinks L2 made the wrong cut — L2 must re-decompose.

summary.description: Plain-prose summary of what changed and why. The Critic reads this verbatim — be precise.

constraints_respected.description: Echo of the TaskAssignment.constraints/forbidden_paths the agent attests it respected.

lessons_applied.description: lessons_learned.id list the agent consulted while making decisions.

open_questions.description: Things the agent is unsure about and wants the Critic to flag for human review.

blocker_note.description: If result=failed or needs_replan, the reason.
